text: As I enter this space, the sharp lines and glass divide the world into compartments, reflecting my own divided mind. The presence of emergency signs and fire equipment hints at the underlying tension between safety and curiosity. Inside, the bold letters R+D and the vibrant colors invite me to contemplate the nature of research and development. I feel a sense of excitement tempered with caution, standing between boundaries—physical and intellectual—wondering what new knowledge might unfold if I step further in.
